sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8044" key="a)ndrofukti/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρο-φυκτίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n8044.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mollusc,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
